vllm.title: Add dockerfile
vllm.author: skrider
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implements #1293
Adds a dockerfile to run vLLM in a containerized environment. This has been tested to work with facebook/opt-13b on 2 g5.2xlarge AWS instances utilizing Ray for communication. Output of benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py:
Total time: 16.32 s
Throughput: 61.28 requests/s
Average latency

vllm.title: Fix integer overflows in attention & cache ops
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #1486
This PR fixes the overflows in paged attention & cache ops when the number of blocks is huge.

vllm.title: [Small] Formatter only checks lints in changed files
vllm.author: cadedaniel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There are many lint failures which makes new ones easy to miss. This PR makes the linter by default only check changed files using the same logic as used for yapf.
Testing
$ ./format.sh --files vllm/block.py
vLLM yapf: Done
vLLM Pylint:

------------------------------------
Your code has been rated

vllm.title: Add `MptForCausalLM` key in model_loader
vllm.author: wenfeiy-db
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
vllm now throws ValueError when a MPT model is loaded without trust_remote_code and with newer transformers versions.
ValueError: Model architectures ['MptForCausalLM'] are not supported for now. Supported architectures: ['AquilaModel', 'AquilaForCausalLM', 'BaiChuanForCausalLM', 'BaichuanForCausalL
